families.query_basis: Reviewed the current official West Virginia Bureau for Medical Services member application page for live Medicaid coverage and application routing.
families.status_reason: Reviewed 2026-06-25 the live official West Virginia Bureau for Medical Services healthcare-application page. It explicitly states that there are several types of Medicaid, preserves multiple official application routes, and states that SSI recipients are automatically eligible for Medicaid through the West Virginia Department of Human Services.

samples.evidence_snippet: Applying for Healthcare: Medicaid, West Virginia Children's Health Insurance Program or Private Insurance at the Health Insurance Marketplace. There isn’t just one type of Medicaid but several.

must_include: Applying for Healthcare: Medicaid, West Virginia Children's Health Insurance Program or Private Insurance at the Health Insurance Marketplace
There isn’t just one type of Medicaid but several.
If you are receiving a check from Supplemental Security Income Program, you are automatically eligible for Medicaid

families.query_basis: Reviewed the current official West Virginia Bureau for Medical Services HCBS waivers page for live waiver program evidence.
families.status_reason: Reviewed 2026-06-25 the live official BMS HCBS/waivers page. It explains that Medicaid waiver programs let members remain at home and explicitly lists the Aged and Disabled Waiver, Children with Serious Emotional Disorder Waiver, Intellectual/Developmental Disabilities Waiver, and Traumatic Brain Injury Waiver.

samples.evidence_snippet: A Medicaid waiver does not have the same rules that normally apply to the Medicaid program. For Medicaid members living at home, like seniors, people with disabilities, and children with serious emotional disorders who require assistance, there are four waiver programs available.

must_include: A Medicaid waiver does not have the same rules that normally apply to the Medicaid program.

families.query_basis: Reviewed the current official West Virginia Bureau for Behavioral Health I/DD page for live developmental-disability authority evidence.
families.status_reason: Reviewed 2026-06-25 the live official Bureau for Behavioral Health I/DD page. The DoHS service directory now points directly to BBH's Intellectual and Developmental Disabilities page, which preserves the current state I/DD program hub and linked statewide disability resources.

samples.evidence_snippet: Intellectual and Developmental Disabilities (I/DD). West Virginia Aging & Disability Resource Centers (ADRCs). West Virginia Developmental Disabilities Council.

families.query_basis: Reviewed the current official West Virginia Birth to Three referral, contact, and regional administrative unit map pages for county-to-region routing.
families.status_reason: Reviewed 2026-06-25 the live official West Virginia Birth to Three referral, state staff, and Regional Administrative Units map pages. The referral page directs families to a local regional office via the office map, while the RAU map explicitly assigns counties to regional administrative units and names the office serving each county group.

samples.evidence_snippet: If you wish to contact your local regional office directly, please review the WV Birth to Three office map to obtain information on the location and phone number of the office that provides services to your county.
Region VIII - Regional Administrative Unit ... Serves: Berkeley, Grant, Hampshire, Hardy, Jefferson, Mineral, Morgan, Pendleton.

must_include: contact your local regional office directly
the office that provides services to your county
WV BIRTH TO THREE REGIONAL ADMINISTRATIVE UNITS

families.query_basis: Reviewed the current official WVDE Special Education office page for IDEA and LEA oversight evidence.
families.status_reason: Reviewed 2026-06-25 the live official WVDE Special Education office page. It explicitly says the Office of Special Education provides leadership, guidance, and oversight to local educational agencies and guarantees services and protections under IDEA and Policy 2419.

samples.evidence_snippet: The Office of Special Education (OSE) provides leadership, guidance, and oversight to local educational agencies (LEAs) to improve outcomes for students with disabilities.

must_include: The Office of Special Education (OSE) provides leadership, guidance, and oversight to local educational agencies (LEAs)
Ensure access to services, protections, and educational opportunities guaranteed under the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act

families.query_basis: Reviewed the current official WVDE and WV School Directory county-routing surfaces.
families.status_reason: Reviewed 2026-06-25 first-party West Virginia education routing surfaces. The live WVDE homepage links directly to the official School Directory host, the directory publicly browses schools by county, and county pages such as Barbour County Schools preserve county office address, phone, superintendent, county website, and school list routing.

samples.evidence_snippet: Barbour County Schools ... 45 School St Philippi, WV 26416-1600 ... Superintendent: Eddie Vincent

families.query_basis: Reviewed the current official WVDRS student services page for Pre-ETS evidence.
families.status_reason: Reviewed 2026-06-25 the live official WV Division of Rehabilitation Services student services page. It states that DRS helps students with disabilities beginning at age 14 and explicitly lists the five Pre-Employment Transition Services activities.

samples.evidence_snippet: Pre-Employment Transition Services (Pre-ETS). DRS provides Pre-ETS to students with disabilities from ages 14 to 21.

must_include: students with disabilities from ages 14 to 21

families.query_basis: Reviewed the live first-party Disability Rights of West Virginia homepage in browser mode because the raw fetch path was too script-heavy for stable text extraction.
families.status_reason: Reviewed 2026-06-25 the live first-party Disability Rights of West Virginia homepage in browser mode. The page states that DRWV is the federally mandated protection and advocacy system for people with disabilities in West Virginia and that its services are confidential and free of charge.

samples.sample_name: Disability Rights of West Virginia homepage
samples.evidence_snippet: Disability Rights of West Virginia (DRWV) is the federally mandated protection and advocacy system for people with disabilities in West Virginia. DRWV is a private, nonprofit agency. Our services are confidential and free of charge.

families.query_basis: Rechecked the inherited first-party WVPTI domain to confirm whether a live PTI designation page still exists.
families.status_reason: Rechecked 2026-06-25 the inherited WVPTI first-party host. The legacy domain now returns HTTP 301 to an unrelated body-shop site, and no current first-party West Virginia PTI designation page was preserved in this bounded official-source pass. West Virginia therefore cannot stay COMPLETE because the PTI family no longer has live first-party evidence.

families.query_basis: Reviewed the current first-party Legal Aid WV homepage for statewide legal-aid evidence.
families.status_reason: Reviewed 2026-06-25 the live first-party Legal Aid WV domain after the legacy lawv.net root redirected to legalaidwv.org. The homepage preserves statewide justice language, Apply For Help routing, and education and health-care help language on the same first-party domain.

samples.evidence_snippet: We believe all West Virginians deserve an equal chance at justice, in the courtroom and in their communities.

must_include: We believe all West Virginians deserve an equal chance at justice
receive the education and health care they need

families.query_basis: Reviewed the current official West Virginia State Treasurer WVABLE page for state ABLE evidence.
families.status_reason: Reviewed 2026-06-25 the live official West Virginia State Treasurer WVABLE page. It states that many people with disabilities can save and invest without losing eligibility for public benefits like SSI or Medicare and that the Treasurer's office offers WVABLE for people with disabilities.

samples.evidence_snippet: Many people with disabilities can now save and invest without losing eligibility for public benefits like Supplemental Security Income (SSI) or Medicare.

must_include: many people with disabilities can now save and invest without losing eligibility for public benefits like Supplemental Security Income (SSI) or Medicare
My office is proud to offer
as a savings and investment option for people with disabilities

families.query_basis: Reviewed the current official West Virginia Medicaid application page because it preserves the state's SSI-to-Medicaid linkage directly.
families.status_reason: Reviewed 2026-06-25 the live official West Virginia Medicaid application page. It explicitly states that people receiving Supplemental Security Income are automatically eligible for Medicaid in West Virginia.

samples.evidence_snippet: If you are receiving a check from Supplemental Security Income Program, you are automatically eligible for Medicaid.

must_include: If you are receiving a check from Supplemental Security Income Program, you are automatically eligible for Medicaid

families.query_basis: Reviewed the current official DoHS field-office directory root plus county-filtered pages for county-specific office routing.
families.status_reason: Reviewed 2026-06-25 official successor West Virginia Department of Human Services field-office surfaces. The live directory exposes a county selector covering Barbour through Wyoming and county-filtered pages preserve county-specific office cards with local addresses and phone numbers.

samples.evidence_snippet: Please select your county... Barbour County ... Berkeley County ... Wyoming County
